race.comment: TWICE AZ COOL (3) is desperate to break through soon. Chased gamely into a midfield finish last start at Scone, only beaten 1.8L. Debuts the blinkers and gets in light with the 4kg claimer engaged. Ready. HARVEY'S TURN (1) looks close to a win after finishing in the money at both runs, the latest when third at Taree over 1007m. Has upside and expected to go well. GLENN'S LEGACY (4) missed the frame when resuming last start over 1200m at Moruya but wasn't all that far from the winner. Can go on with it. MISS PEONY (11) turned in a much better performance when sitting on pace at Bathurst. Keeping safe.
